mapper.select: select * from study_record where user_id = #{userId} and course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.insert: insert into study_record (user_id, course_id, progress, last_study_time, createtime, updatetime) values (#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{progress}, #{lastStudyTime}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update study_record set progress = #{progress}, last_study_time = #{lastStudyTime}, updatetime = now() where user_id = #{userId} and course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.select: select c.*, sr.progress, sr.last_study_time from course c join study_record sr on c.id = sr.course_id where sr.user_id = #{userId} order by sr.last_study_time desc
